requirement_topic.zh: 连接器兼容性：GB/T 20234 与 IEC 62196
requirement_topic.zht: 連接器相容性：GB/T 20234 與 IEC 62196

summary.en: No official universal Kenyan public-EV connector mandate was confirmed from the web search results reviewed. User-supplied EPRA EV Charging and Battery Swapping Infrastructure Guidelines 2023 flags for Type 2 AC, CCS2/CHAdeMO DC, approximately 25 km public-station spacing, and operator licensing should be verified against the current EPRA guideline before being stated as binding. Connector requirements should therefore be taken from the KEBS PVoC route, applicable Kenyan Standard or approved IEC equivalent, confirmed EPRA/project specification, vehicle fleet, and charging-network requirements.
summary.zh: 已审阅的网页搜索结果未确认肯尼亚存在统一的公共电动汽车充电接口强制规则。用户提供的 EPRA EV Charging and Battery Swapping Infrastructure Guidelines 2023 标记，包括 Type 2 交流、CCS2/CHAdeMO 直流、约 25 km 公共站间距和运营商许可，应在表述为强制要求前，对照现行 EPRA 指南核实。因此，连接器要求应来自 KEBS PVoC 路径、适用肯尼亚标准或认可 IEC 等效标准、已确认的 EPRA/项目规格、车辆车队和充电网络要求。
summary.zht: 已審閱的網頁搜尋結果未確認肯亞存在統一的公共電動汽車充電介面強制規則。使用者提供的 EPRA EV Charging and Battery Swapping Infrastructure Guidelines 2023 標記，包括 Type 2 交流、CCS2/CHAdeMO 直流、約 25 km 公共站間距和營運商許可，應在表述為強制要求前，對照現行 EPRA 指南核實。因此，連接器要求應來自 KEBS PVoC 路徑、適用肯亞標準或認可 IEC 等效標準、已確認的 EPRA/專案規格、車輛車隊和充電網路要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196 series where specified or accepted
EPRA EV Charging and Battery Swapping Infrastructure Guidelines 2023 - verify current guideline before relying on Type 2 AC, CCS2/CHAdeMO DC, approximately 25 km spacing, or operator-licensing flags
Applicable Kenyan Standard or approved equivalent specification
Project, fleet, and charging-network connector specification

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234 for EV conductive-charging connection devices. GB/T 20234 connector geometry, locking, signaling, current ratings, and communication assumptions should not be treated as drop-in IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用 GB/T 20234 作为电动汽车传导充电连接装置标准。GB/T 20234 的连接器几何、锁止、信号、电流额定值和通信假设不应被视为可直接替代 IEC 62196 Type 2 或 CCS2 证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用 GB/T 20234 作為電動汽車傳導充電連接裝置標準。GB/T 20234 的連接器幾何、鎖止、信號、電流額定值和通信假設不應被視為可直接替代 IEC 62196 Type 2 或 CCS2 證據。

gap.en: Confirm whether the Kenyan buyer wants GB/T, Type 2, CCS2, CHAdeMO, or another connector ecosystem, then align cable assemblies, sockets, vehicle connectors, pilot / proximity circuits, DC communication, labels, spares, and test reports to that ecosystem.
gap.zh: 应确认肯尼亚买方需要 GB/T、Type 2、CCS2、CHAdeMO 或其他连接器生态，然后将线缆组件、插座、车辆连接器、导引/接近电路、直流通信、标签、备件和测试报告对齐到该生态。
gap.zht: 應確認肯亞買方需要 GB/T、Type 2、CCS2、CHAdeMO 或其他連接器生態，然後將線纜組件、插座、車輛連接器、導引／接近電路、直流通信、標籤、備件和測試報告對齊到該生態。

mandatory_status.target: Project, fleet, network, PVoC, Kenyan Standard, or accepted-specification dependent; no verified official blanket connector mandate found
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is a China connector baseline and is not automatic IEC 62196 compatibility

source.title: IEC 62196-2:2022 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets – Conductive charging of electric vehicles – Part 2: Dimensional compatibility requirements for AC pin and contact-tube accessories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector fit is a hardware interoperability question. A GB/T 20234 charger should not be represented as IEC 62196-compatible unless the actual connector set and test evidence prove it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 连接器适配属于硬件互操作问题。除非实际连接器组合和测试证据能够证明，否则不应将 GB/T 20234 充电桩表述为兼容 IEC 62196。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 連接器適配屬於硬體互操作問題。除非實際連接器組合和測試證據能夠證明，否則不應將 GB/T 20234 充電樁表述為相容 IEC 62196。
